title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: Today's signal is thin but clear: the notable fresh trust-and-safety update is operational security, not a new policy framework or evaluation method. OpenAI disclosed its response to a developer-tool supply chain compromise, underscoring how software integrity and incident response remain core AI deployment risks alongside model behavior and governance.

items.title: OpenAI details response to Axios developer tool compromise
items.why_it_matters: Supply chain security failures can directly affect AI software trust, distribution integrity, and incident response readiness.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
